response.justification: The candidate is a versatile, experienced senior engineer with strong software craftsmanship, polyglot skills, and some high-throughput systems exposure, but the profile does not match a Principal IC6 scoped to growth and experimentation systems. There is no evidence of building experimentation platforms, feature-flagging systems, telemetry/metrics infrastructure, or statistical analysis work, and no demonstrated multi-workstream technical leadership at the principal level across teams and products.
strengths: 15+ years of hands-on engineering across web, mobile, backend, and embedded systems
Low-latency, high-throughput microservices experience (millions of HTTP requests/sec at Dunnhumby)
Strong engineering fundamentals: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, plus recent AI-agent tooling (MCP) work
concerns: No experimentation, A/B testing, metrics, or telemetry platform experience — the core of this role
No demonstrated principal-level scope: architecting cross-team platforms or leading multi-workstream initiatives
Career trajectory is senior IC product work at small/mid-size companies, not enterprise-scale platform ownership

key_factors.factor: Seniority gap vs Principal IC6 scope
Strong general engineering fundamentals and systems experience
